parents.subject: LU-17015 obdclass: new primitives for upcall cache

commit.subject: LU-0000 osc: aren't all pages encrypted?
commit.message:
LU-0000 osc: aren't all pages encrypted?

I thought all pages were encrypted if any were?
And there's that whole PageChecked business... Hm.
I thought all pages were like that...

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I73abb7b9d2f09dc2db9e4f4f78c6b1282634580f
